name: mcp-sketch
description: Open an Excalidraw sketch via the MCP App tile.

match.userMessage: open a sketch for the checkout redesign

toolCalls.name: excalidraw__create_scene
toolCalls.arguments: {"prompt":"Wireframe a guest-checkout flow with an upsell modal. Show: 1) cart page, 2) guest-or-account choice, 3) shipping form, 4) payment, 5) upsell modal, 6) confirmation."}

response.content: Sketched the checkout flow in Excalidraw — you can edit it inline above. The upsell modal is positioned right after payment so we don't block conversion.
